name: Abyssal Obsession
descriptionTemplate: Faros gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 Tentacle. For each card Faros plays, draw [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|card|cards}, trigger [Arg3]% {Poison} on all enemies, up to 3 times per turn.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Faros gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 Tentacle. For each card Faros plays, draw [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|card|cards}, trigger [Arg3]% {Poison} on all enemies, and when Tentacles deal DMG this turn, additionally inflict {Poison} equal to 3% of DMG dealt, up to 3 times per turn.
